rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value. Educ. Code §39.0236 governs a formative assessment pilot program. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 39.0236. INTEGRATED FORMATIVE ASSESSMENT PILOT PROGRAM.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and education assessment statute.
